'''wobavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:voetstoets|voetstoets]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voetstoets|voetstoets]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wobavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobavithi|wobavithi]] || [[word:wobaviji|wobaviji]] || [[word:wobavishi|wobavishi]] || [[word:wobaviki|wobaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobavuthuthu|wobavuthuthu]] || [[word:wobavujuju|wobavujuju]] || [[word:wobavushushu|wobavushushu]] || [[word:wobavukuku|wobavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobavuthu|wobavuthu]] || [[word:wobavuju|wobavuju]] || [[word:wobavushu|wobavushu]] || [[word:wobavuku|wobavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobavufthuf|wobavufthuf]] || [[word:wobavufjuf|wobavufjuf]] || [[word:wobavufshuf|wobavufshuf]] || [[word:wobavufkuf|wobavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobavethe|wobavethe]] || [[word:wobaveje|wobaveje]] || [[word:wobaveshe|wobaveshe]] || [[word:wobaveke|wobaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobavothotho|wobavothotho]] || [[word:wobavojojo|wobavojojo]] || [[word:wobavoshosho|wobavoshosho]] || [[word:wobavokoko|wobavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobavotho|wobavotho]] || [[word:wobavojo|wobavojo]] || [[word:wobavosho|wobavosho]] || [[word:wobavoko|wobavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobavofthof|wobavofthof]] || [[word:wobavofjof|wobavofjof]] || [[word:wobavofshof|wobavofshof]] || [[word:wobavofkof|wobavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfthÃŸf|wobavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfjÃŸf|wobavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfshÃŸf|wobavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfkÃŸf|wobavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wobavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wobavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wobavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wobavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfthÃŸf|wobavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfjÃŸf|wobavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfshÃŸf|wobavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfkÃŸf|wobavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfthÃŸf|wobavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfjÃŸf|wobavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfshÃŸf|wobavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobavÃŸfkÃŸf|wobavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobavÃḊthÃḊ|wobavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wobavÃḊjÃḊ|wobavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wobavÃḊshÃḊ|wobavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wobavÃḊkÃḊ|wobavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobavathatha|wobavathatha]] || [[word:wobavajaja|wobavajaja]] || [[word:wobavashasha|wobavashasha]] || [[word:wobavakaka|wobavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobavatha|wobavatha]] || [[word:wobavaja|wobavaja]] || [[word:wobavasha|wobavasha]] || [[word:wobavaka|wobavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobavafthaf|wobavafthaf]] || [[word:wobavafjaf|wobavafjaf]] || [[word:wobavafshaf|wobavafshaf]] || [[word:wobavafkaf|wobavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wobavasha|wobavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobavshÃḋsha|wobavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobavrosha|wobavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobavmusha|wobavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobavyasha|wobavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobavnkshÃḋsha|gowobavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobavnkrosha|gowobavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobavnkmusha|gowobavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobavnkyasha|gowobavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wobabavasha|wobabavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobabavshÃḋsha|wobabavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobabavrosha|wobabavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobabavmusha|wobabavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobabavyasha|wobabavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobabavnkshÃḋsha|gowobabavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobabavnkrosha|gowobabavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobabavnkmusha|gowobabavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobabavnkyasha|gowobabavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:webÃḊvasha|webÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:webÃḊvshÃḋsha|webÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:webÃḊvrosha|webÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:webÃḊvmusha|webÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:webÃḊvyasha|webÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowebÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gowebÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowebÃḊvnkrosha|gowebÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowebÃḊvnkmusha|gowebÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowebÃḊvnkyasha|gowebÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wobfavasha|wobfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobfavshÃḋsha|wobfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobfavrosha|wobfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobfavmusha|wobfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobfavyasha|wobfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobfavnkshÃḋsha|gowobfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobfavnkrosha|gowobfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobfavnkmusha|gowobfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobfavnkyasha|gowobfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
